pageDescription: Calculate estate tax  with our free online calculator

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estate tax  estimates only

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and should not replace professional advice

messages.enterInformation: Enter the required information to calculate estate tax
messages.resultMessage: Your estate tax  calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estate tax  estimates based on standard methods. Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized advice and detailed information, consult with professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and circumstances.

total_amount_youve_gifted_tax_free_in_yo: Total amount you've gifted tax free in your lifetime
no_estate_tax_is_owed_since_the_estate_i: No estate tax is owed since the estate is below the exemption threshold.
savings_cds_and_checking_account_balance: Savings, CDs, and Checking Account Balance
total_amount_youve_gifted_tax_free_in_yo: Total amount you've gifted tax free in your lifetime
the_federal_estate_tax_rate_is_a_flat_40:
The federal estate tax rate is a flat 40% on the amount exceeding the $13.99M exemption for
                          2025.
enter_your_estate_information_to_see_you: Enter your estate information to see your results
assets_real_estate_investments_savings_v:
Assets = Real Estate + Investments + Savings + Vehicles + Retirement Plans + Life Insurance +
                        Other Assets
liabilities_mortgages_loans_credit_cards:
Liabilities = Mortgages + Loans + Credit Cards + Funeral Expenses + Administration Expenses +
                        Claims
gross_estate_assets_liabilities_lifetime: Gross Estate = Assets - Liabilities + Lifetime Gifts - Charitable Contributions
taxable_estate_max0_gross_estate_federal: Taxable Estate = max(0, Gross Estate - Federal Exemption)
